prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年武汉大学在天津市综合类最低录取位次分别为约1935名、1255名、1434名、2140名、2137名。2021–2023年位次在1255–1935之间波动，2024年跳升至2140名，2025年基本持平于2137名，近两年趋于稳定在2130–2140区间，但较2022年峰值后移约880名；该校在天津市综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为79人，2024年78人，2025年77人，2026年为78人，较2025年扩招1人，增幅约1.3%，小幅缓解竞争压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 武汉大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2024年位列第9名，2025年升至第8名，2026年保持第8名，稳居全国顶尖高校行列；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，涉及校园安全、师德师风、学术不端等事件共99件（负面64件），可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第19（高热），综合热度约260万，短视频平台曝光量大，关注度仍处高位。历史投档异常数据中未见武汉大学在天津有明显断档记录；第五轮学科评估中法学A+、马克思主义理论A+、测绘科学与技术A+、地球物理学A+、水利工程A、生物学A、中国语言文学A、工商管理A等，A-及以上学科超过20个，学科实力顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息类、法学、临床医学等专业社会热度持续偏高；天津市2026年高考总考生约82000人，较2025年71938人增长约14%，竞争明显加剧；武汉大学位于湖北武汉，属中部地区，在天津无特殊地域偏好；该校在天津招生计划约78人，占比较小，地域因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年稳定在2130–2140区间、2026年扩招1人（小幅缓解竞争）、天津市考生总数大幅增长约14%（显著加剧竞争）、声誉偏负面（轻微抑制热度）但抖音高热（维持关注度）等多重因素，以，考虑考生规模增加带来的竞争加剧为主方向，预测2026年最低录取位次约2134名，较2025年2137名略前移3名（竞争略加剧），区间1891–2377名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约2134名，区间1891–2377名。位次在区间下限（1891名）以内可重点冲刺一档弘毅学堂试验班、法学、计算机等王牌专业；位次在区间中部（约2134名）建议以二档电子信息、遥感、数学、临床医学为主力，搭配一档专业冲刺；位次在区间上限（2377名）附近建议以三档专业保底，同时争取二档专业。武汉大学学科实力均衡，各档专业均有A类学科支撑，报考价值高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Wuhan University in Tianjin's comprehensive category were approximately 1935, 1255, 1434, 2140, and 2137 respectively. Rankings fluctuated between 1255 and 1935 from 2021 to 2023, jumped to 2140 in 2024, and remained nearly stable at 2137 in 2025, stabilizing in the 2130–2140 range in recent years, but about 880 places behind the 2022 peak. The enrollment plan for comprehensive category in Tianjin was 79 students from 2021 to 2023, 78 in 2024, 77 in 2025, and 78 in 2026, an increase of 1 student compared to 2025, a growth of about 1.3%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Wuhan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 9th from 2021 to 2024, rose to 8th in 2025, and remained 8th in 2026, firmly among the top universities in China. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, involving 99 incidents related to campus safety, teacher ethics, academic misconduct, etc. (64 negative), which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranked 19th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of about 2.6 million, high exposure on short video platforms, and still high attention. Historical abnormal admission data shows no obvious gaps for Wuhan University in Tianjin. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has A+ in Law, Marxist Theory, Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology, Geophysics, A in Water Conservancy Engineering, Biology, Chinese Language and Literature, Business Administration, etc., with over 20 A- and above disciplines, top-tier disciplinary strength, strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, Law, and Clinical Medicine continue to have high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Tianjin is about 82,000, an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Wuhan University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with no special regional preference in Tianjin. Its enrollment plan in Tianjin is about 78 students, a relatively small proportion, so regional factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the stabilization of historical rankings in the 2130–2140 range in recent years, the enrollment increase of 1 student in 2026 (slightly easing competition), the significant increase of about 14% in the total number of Tianjin candidates (sharply intensifying competition), the somewhat negative reputation (slightly suppressing popularity) but high Douyin heat (maintaining attention), and taking the intensified competition due to the increase in candidate numbers as the main direction, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 2134, slightly moving forward by 3 places compared to 2025's 2137 (competition slightly intensifies), with a range of 1891–2377.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 2134, with a range of 1891–2377. Candidates with rankings at the lower bound (1891) or better can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Hongyi College experimental classes, Law, and Computer Science. Candidates with rankings around the middle (about 2134) are advised to target Tier 2 majors such as Electronic Information, Remote Sensing, Mathematics, and Clinical Medicine as the main choices, while also attempting Tier 1 majors. Candidates with rankings near the upper bound (2377) are advised to secure Tier 3 majors as a safety net while also trying for Tier 2 majors. Wuhan University has balanced disciplinary strength, with A-level disciplines supporting each tier of majors, offering high application value.
